title: Walk-in Drive Software Engineer at Samsung R&D India

jsonLd.title: Walk-in Drive Software Engineer at Samsung R&D India
jsonLd.description:
Samsung R&D India, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Software Engineer for our Gurgaon operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Samsung R&D India:
Samsung R&D India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in CI/CD

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Flexible working hours
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Gurgaon, Haryana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Samsung R&D India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
